tailored.summary: I am a full-stack engineer with a passion for building scalable web applications. I bring extensive experience in developing user-facing features with React and TypeScript, and designing robust Node.js REST APIs backed by PostgreSQL. My goal is to leverage my full-stack expertise to contribute to innovative projects.

bullets: Built React/TypeScript dashboards consumed by 10k users, enhancing user experience and data accessibility.
Designed and implemented Node.js REST APIs, ensuring efficient data retrieval and manipulation using PostgreSQL.
Delivered 8 client sites using React and TypeScript, meeting diverse project requirements.
Integrated third-party REST APIs for critical payment and authentication flows, ensuring secure and seamless user transactions.
